CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, original_word String);
SELECT id, original_word, normalizeUTF8NFKD(original_word) AS normalized_word FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, normalizeUTF8NFKD(original_word) AS normalized_word, length(normalized_word) AS normalized_length FROM test_strings WHERE length(normalized_word) > 5;
SELECT id, original_word, length(original_word) AS original_length, normalizeUTF8NFKD(original_word) AS normalized_word FROM test_strings ORDER BY original_length DESC;
WITH (SELECT id, normalizeUTF8NFKD(original_word) AS normalized_word FROM test_strings) AS subquery SELECT id, normalized_word FROM subquery WHERE id IN (1, 3, 5);
SELECT a.word, normalizeUTF8NFKD(a.word) AS normalized, length(a.word) AS original_length FROM additional_strings AS a JOIN test_strings AS b ON length(a.word) < 10;
SELECT b.id, normalizeUTF8NFKD(b.original_word) AS normalized_word FROM test_strings AS b WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM additional_strings AS a WHERE length(a.word) < 8);
SELECT count(*) AS total_words, count(DISTINCT normalizeUTF8NFKD(original_word)) AS unique_normalized_words FROM test_strings;
